---
title: "Pathway Characterization"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(igraph)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(here)
})

source(here::here("R/stats.R"))
source(here::here("R/pathway_characterization.R"))
```

```{r}
largest_subgraph_undirected <- readRDS(here::here("networks", "largest_subgraph_undirected.rds"))
pathway_stats               <- readRDS(here::here("pathway_info", "pathway_stats.rds"))
```

# Characterize all pathways

```{r}
#| include: false
pw_char <- characterize_all_pathways(
  graph        = largest_subgraph_undirected,
  pathway_data = pathway_stats,
  min_genes    = 10
)

pw_char <- pw_char %>% arrange(desc(n_genes))
pw_char
```

# Summary statistics

```{r}
pw_char %>%
  summarise(
    n_pathways       = n(),
    median_genes     = median(n_genes),
    median_components = median(n_components),
    median_frac_iso  = round(median(frac_isolated), 3),
    median_sub_deg   = round(median(mean_subgraph_deg), 2)
  )
```

# Candidate pathway selection

Select pathways for Tier 2 simulations across size and connectivity strata.

```{r}
# Small well-connected pathways (20-50 genes, few components)
small_pw <- pw_char %>%
  filter(n_genes >= 20, n_genes <= 50, n_components <= 3) %>%
  arrange(n_components, desc(mean_subgraph_deg)) %>%
  head(3)

small_pw
```

```{r}
# Medium pathways (100-200 genes)
medium_pw <- pw_char %>%
  filter(n_genes >= 100, n_genes <= 200) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_subgraph_deg)) %>%
  head(3)

medium_pw
```

```{r}
# Large pathways (400+ genes)
large_pw <- pw_char %>%
  filter(n_genes >= 400) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_subgraph_deg)) %>%
  head(2)

large_pw
```

```{r}
# Fragmented pathways (high frac_isolated) for contrast
fragmented_pw <- pw_char %>%
  filter(n_genes >= 20, frac_isolated >= 0.3) %>%
  arrange(desc(frac_isolated)) %>%
  head(3)

fragmented_pw
```

# Save characterization

```{r}
saveRDS(pw_char, here::here("pathway_info", "pathway_characterization.rds"))
```
